title: cyathea pinnula
intro: Cyathea pinnula, also known as the New Zealand fern, is a species of tree fern that belongs to the family Cyatheaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyathea pinnula include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
